name: Augment company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API hands-free for Research Assistant (01455)

parameters.content:
### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 1 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Load Previous Snapshot

### Load Previous Snapshot

googleSheets — `read` operation against the connected account.

Next: Fetch Changes Since Watermark

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Fetch Changes Since Watermark

GET https://api.example.com/v1/requests — retries 3× with backoff on failure.

Next: Normalize Records

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 API key / bearer for the target API

### Normalize Records

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming request records to a stable schema

Next: Upsert into HubSpot

### Upsert into HubSpot

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Next: Advance Watermark

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Advance Watermark

Custom JavaScript: Advance the incremental watermark to the newest record seen

Next: Persist Watermark (Google Sheets)

### Persist Watermark (Google Sheets)

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

# Augment company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API hands-free for Research Assistant (01455)

**Pattern:** Data Enrichment · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Augment company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API hands-free for Research Assistant (01455). It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual research assistant is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Load Previous Snapshot → Fetch Changes Since Watermark → Normalize Records → Upsert into HubSpot → Advance Watermark → Persist Watermark (Google Sheets)

## Use it for
- Teams that want to data enrichment without manual effort
- Anyone automating research assistant in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Responds in seconds
- Standardizes the process every time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; Google OAuth2 / service account; HubSpot private-app token.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your research assistant process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
